mapper.sql: select o.id, o.order_no, o.wx_user_id, o.group_room_id, o.couple_space_id, o.recipient_wx_user_id, u.nickname as user_nickname, o.service_type, o.chef_id, c.chef_name, o.rider_id, r.rider_name, o.receiver_name, o.receiver_phone, o.receiver_address, o.total_count, o.total_amount, o.order_status, o.pay_status, o.share_flag, o.create_by, o.create_time, o.update_by, o.update_time, o.remark from kitchen_order o left join kitchen_wx_user u on u.id = o.wx_user_id left join kitchen_chef c on c.id = o.chef_id left join kitchen_rider r on r.id = o.rider_id
mapper.select: select id, order_id, dish_id, dish_name, dish_cover, spec_json, quantity, price from kitchen_order_item where order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert:
insert into kitchen_order
order_no, wx_user_id, group_room_id, service_type, couple_space_id, recipient_wx_user_id, chef_id, rider_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, total_count, total_amount, order_status, pay_status, share_flag, remark, create_by, create_time
#{orderNo}, #{wxUserId}, #{groupRoomId}, #{serviceType}, #{coupleSpaceId}, #{recipientWxUserId}, #{chefId}, #{riderId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, #{totalCount}, #{totalAmount}, #{orderStatus}, #{payStatus}, #{shareFlag}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate()
mapper.update: update kitchen_order set del_flag = '2' where id = #{id}
update kitchen_order set del_flag = '2' where id in #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into kitchen_order_item(order_id, dish_id, dish_name, dish_cover, spec_json, quantity, price) values
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.dishId}, #{item.dishName}, #{item.dishCover}, #{item.specJson}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.price})
mapper.delete: delete from kitchen_order_item where order_id in #{id}
